steps.name: code_changes
steps.acceptance: max_atoms config parameter added to train.py, model constructor, dataset classes. Truncation logic works for max_atoms < 21. evaluate_molecule uses max_atoms correctly.

steps.name: verification
steps.acceptance: max_atoms=9 produces (B,9,3) tensors. max_atoms=12 produces (B,12,3). Forward-inverse consistency at each max_atoms. Model parameter count same regardless of max_atoms (except pos_embed).

steps.name: phase1_extremes
steps.acceptance: T=9 and T=21 ethanol training runs complete (5000 steps each). VF computed for both. Both VF >= 90% is the pass condition.

steps.name: phase1_intermediates
steps.acceptance: T=12, T=15, T=18 ethanol training runs complete. VF >= 90% for all.

steps.name: phase1_gate
steps.acceptance: All 5 padding sizes achieve VF >= 90%. Phase 1 passes. If any drops >20pp, report FAILURE.

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic report analyzing hyp_006 baseline multi-molecule performance with output-shift.

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: Plan sub-report with SANITY/HEURISTICS/SCALE angles approved by Postdoc.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: 20k step multi-molecule run complete. VF > 40% ethanol AND mean VF > 30% is promising.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep over lr x n_steps x batch_size complete (up to 8 runs). Best config selected.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run with best sweep config. Evaluate all 8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.acceptance: d_model=256, n_blocks=12 validation run. VF > best HEURISTICS result is promising.

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final experiment report written with all results, plots, analysis.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_007; pre-merge checks pass.
